calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,320p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json && uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73372297 --event evt-petition-disposition --role predictor","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg --files data/cases/scotus/73372297 | sort && UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73372297 --event evt-petition-disposition --role predictor","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg --files -uu data/cases/scotus/73372297 | sort && find . -path '*73372297*' -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"wc -l -w -c data/cases/scotus/73372297/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml data/cases/scotus/73372297/record/snapshots/2026-07-17.json data/cases/scotus/73372297/record/context.json data/cases/scotus/73372297/record/documents/documents.json data/cases/scotus/73372297/record/documents/questions-presented.txt data/cases/scotus/73372297/record/documents/petition.txt && sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73372297/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,700p' data/cases/scotus/73372297/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '180,430p' data/cases/scotus/73372297/record/documents/petition.txt && rg -n -i 'Modern discretionary|salience band|Federal Circuit|relist|CVSG|paid|IFP|grant rate' metrics/statpack.md | head -100","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '45,180p' metrics/statpack.md && rg -n -i 'Federal Circuit|Fed\\. Cir|CAFC|originating' metrics/statpack.md metrics/statpack.json | head -80","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":24000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"jq -r '.. | objects | select(has(\"title\")) | .title' metrics/statpack.json | sort -u && jq '.. | objects | select(.title? == \"SCOTUS cert petitions by Term\")' metrics/statpack.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"jq 'keys' metrics/statpack.json && jq '.scotus_cert_terms // .terms // .term_stats // empty' metrics/statpack.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court scotus --disposition granted --era 2020s --limit 5 2>&1\nUV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court scotus --disposition denied --era 2020s --limit 5 2>&1","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const matches = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|citation|search/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description)); text(matches);
